case_title: DONALD COPELAND VS. CEDRIC HORNE et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COPELAND, DONALD

FEE WAIVER HEARING HELD, NO APPEARANCES. DONALD COPELAND'S APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS IS DENIED. APPLICANT HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COPELAND, DONALD AS TO DEFENDANT HORNE, CEDRIC HORNE, MICHELLE HORNE, QUITA HORNE, MANIKA HORNE, JERAMIAH SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF COPELAND, DONALD HEARING SET FOR OCT-04-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF DONALD COPELAND ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF COPELAND, DONALD
